director.name: 克莱尔·提特丽 Clair Titley

this_title: Friends Like These: The Murder of Skylar Neese
introduction: Friends Like These examines the case of the West Virginia 16-year-old Skylar Neese who vanished from her home in July 2012, prompting a months-long search. An investigation by the federal and state law enforcement eventually implicated a couple of Neese’s closest friends in her death in a shocking case that received national media attention.
chinese_title: Friends Like These: The Murder of Skylar Neese
